Technical Specification Sheet

Fire, Gas & Life Safety

Life Safety & Early Warning Detection Engineered to British Standards.

[Technical Asset: Fire, Gas & Life Safety]Asset pending final approval.

Engineering Architecture

Our life safety division engineers addressable fire alarm networks, industrial gas leak detection units, and standalone smoke/heat alarms. Systems are designed with consultative discipline to ensure early detection, swift voice evacuation, and full insurance compliance without over-specification.

Procurement Compliance Standards

All systems specified on this schedule adhere strictly to British Standards (BS EN guidelines) and incorporate privacy-masking features to satisfy UK GDPR digital evidence requirements. We specify energy-efficient equipment sized to actual site risk rather than inflating invoice values.

Design StandardsSystems Specified to British Standards (BS 5839 / BS EN 54 Guidelines)

Engineering Definition: The rigorous code of practice governing the design, installation, commissioning, and maintenance of fire detection and fire alarm systems in buildings.

Fire Detection ArchitectureAddressable Commercial Fire Alarm Panels & Optical Smoke/Heat Sensors

Engineering Definition: Intelligent loop wiring where each detector possesses a unique digital address, identifying the exact room or zone of an incident immediately.

Hazardous Gas MonitoringCommercial Kitchen & Plant Room Gas Leak Detection Units with Shut-Off Relays

Engineering Definition: Industrial catalytic sensors that detect methane and LPG leaks, automatically triggering solenoid valves to shut off main gas supplies.

Carbon Monoxide SafetyHardwired CO Detectors Interlinked for Managed Residential Compliance

Engineering Definition: Electro-chemical sensing units continuously monitoring for toxic carbon monoxide, wired into shared residential alarm loops.

Emergency Illumination3-Hour Non-Maintained & Maintained LED Emergency Exit Lighting

Engineering Definition: Backup battery-powered escape lighting that automatically illuminates egress corridors and stairwells during a mains power failure.

Evacuation SystemsIntegrated Voice Evacuation & Public Address (PA-VA) Alarm Broadcast

Engineering Definition: Automated spoken emergency messaging proven to evacuate complex commercial buildings up to 35% faster than traditional alarm sirens.

Hardware Schedule

Current Deployed Hardware Range.

Range discipline: we specify quality-verified equipment from established manufacturers, backed by documented handover packs.

Component SKUTechnical SpecificationTypical Deployment Use
Addressable Fire PanelMulti-loop addressable fire detection panel with touchscreen zone mapping & event logCommercial offices, retail complexes & industrial facilities
Standalone Smoke & Heat AlarmOptical smoke and rate-of-rise heat detectors with RF/wired interlink capabilityManaged residential blocks & HMO tenant safety compliance
Gas Leak Detection UnitIndustrial methane/LPG gas sensing unit with automated solenoid valve shut-off relayCommercial kitchens, boiler houses & mechanical plant rooms
Commercial CO DetectorElectro-chemical carbon monoxide sensor with relay output and audible alarm sounderRented residential properties & enclosed parking garages
Emergency & Exit LightingFlush-mounted LED emergency downlights and illuminated exit legend signageCommunal stairwells, corridors & designated fire escape routes
